prompt: Use this star as a custom bullet before each line.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the 'EAT MORE ART' graphic. Incorporate the star design from image 2 by placing one instance to the left of the 'EAT MORE' text, aligned vertically with its center. Add a second instance of the star to the left of the 'ART' text, aligned vertically with its center. Each star should function as a custom bullet point for its respective line.
objects: "EAT MORE ART" text graphic (with splatter texture)
